description: Response body exceeds 1 MiB. SDK MUST enforce the cap during streaming (not after full buffer) — never load >1 MiB into memory just to fail.
rationale: Streaming cap at 1 MiB. Over-cap hard-fails identically to digest mismatch. Cap before full buffering — a 1 GiB response should fail the connection at the 1 MiB mark, not after the full body is downloaded.
